research_question: In premature infants born before 37 weeks gestation who require resuscitation at birth, does a lower fraction of inspired oxygen (FiO2 < 0.4) compared to higher oxygen concentration (FiO2 ≥ 0.4) as initial gas mixtures, while targeting the same oxygen saturation, affect mortality and neurodevelopmental disability?

comparison.name: Comparison
include: FiO2 greater than or equal to 0.4
room air-oxygen mixture with high FiO2
higher concentration oxygen for initial resuscitation
fraction of inspired oxygen 40% or greater
exclude: different ventilation strategies without oxygen comparison
comparisons where saturation targets differ between groups
